questions.scenario: A Cloud SQL high availability setup helps with an instance failure. What does it not automatically undo?

options.text: A bad migration that wrote wrong data.
The existence of a standby pattern.

questions.explanation: HA helps availability. Backups and restore plans help recover data correctness.

questions.scenario: The team enables automated backups but never restores to a test instance. What remains unproven?

options.text: Whether the backup can become usable data again.

questions.explanation: A restore drill proves recovery capability.

questions.scenario: Which questions belong in Cloud SQL recovery review?

options.text: Is point-in-time recovery needed and enabled?
Can support users delete backups casually?

questions.explanation: Recovery review should describe backup, recovery window, and restore target.
